Transponder.title: Transponder
Transponder.description: It is mandatory for all ships to have a powered and functioning transponder. The construction of anything other than hull is forbidden until one has been installed. This must also be powered on to enable other ships to find us.

NavConsole.title: Navigation console
NavConsole.description: Required to navigate a ship throughout the universe.

CommConsole.title: Comms console
CommConsole.description: Used for communication with other ships.

SmallThruster.title: Small thruster
SmallThruster.description: Provides a small amount of forward thrust when activated.

MediumThruster.title: Medium thruster
MediumThruster.description: Provides a moderate amount of forward thrust when activated.

LargeThruster.title: Large thruster
LargeThruster.description: Provides a large amount of forward thrust when activated.

Aeroponics.title: Aeroponics
Aeroponics.description: A place to grow plants and vegetables.
